561 V0100C_PRIOR_ASMT_RFRNC_DT V0100C_PRIOR_ASMT_RFRNC_DT V0100C Prior Assessment Reference Date CHAR 8 The data in this column contains the assessment reference date from the most recent prior OBRA or PPS assessment.
